calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-11-2017 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-17-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-16-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2016 Set For Trial On Jan-17-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT JAMES HARRISON'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. Since defendant now knows the factual and legal basis for plaintiff's request for fees, no useful purpose would be achieved, and the parties would be required to incur more expense, by the granting of the motion, especially in a case with a comparatively modest amount at issue. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, Bus. Tel: 415-551-3745. (D302)
